SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NECFCU REPRESENTED BY LILLY LO, MANAGER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NECFCU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AOIEONG, DONNY $1,143.53 PRINCIPAL, $114.35 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.88, $1143.53 PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST - ONE YEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
